raw_consumer_statement: I did not get the card. I did not make a charge. I received a bill. When I have called no one can tell me what the charge is for. All other credit card companies write on the card where the charge is from. The company states they investigated said I owed it but still can not tell me what the charge is for. That is not how fraud works. When I type in the account number they say no account found. I can not get any legitimate answers. Thank you in advance.
